tables.description: eligibility_checklist: This dataset has been checked for HIPAA sensitive information, consistency between the asserted data in the study description with the data available through dbGaP, distributable study document corresponding to the dataset, format for study loading, and items that may be ambiguous to dbGaP users. Code meanings and truncated variable descriptions are provided as submitted. For questions regarding the data, please contact the study investigators.

variables.name: AbleToGiveInformedConsent
variables.description: Is the subject or subject's legal representative able to give informed consent

variables.name: Activedisea_MusculoskelSympWInfl
variables.description: Active disease: Musculoskeletal symptoms (with inflammatory features including joint swelling or morning stiffness) in combination with an ESR of > 40 mm in the first hour by the Westergren method or a CRP measurement above the laboratory normal limit

variables.name: Activedisease_Headachethatisapre
variables.description: Active disease: Headache that is a) present for more than one day; b) non-fleeting; c) not fully relieved with non-narcotic analgesics; and d) not typical for any pre-existing form of headaches the patient may have experienced (such as migraines or tension)

variables.name: Activedisease_Ischemicretinopath
variables.description: Active disease: Ischemic retinopathy, optic neuropathy, or visual loss

variables.name: Activedisease_MalaiseFatigueWESR
variables.description: Active disease: Malaise and fatigue in combination with an ESR of more than 40 mm in the first hour by the Westergren method or a CRP measurement above the laboratory normal limit

variables.name: Activedisease_Newsignssymptomsof
variables.description: Active disease: New signs/symptoms of limb ischemia, including pain, claudication, new pulselessness, or diminished pulse

variables.name: Activedisease_Othersymptomsign
variables.description: Active disease: Other symptoms/signs attributed by the investigator to Takayasu's arteritis that necessitate reinstitution or increase in GC for the treatment of Takayasu's Arteritis

variables.name: Activedisease_Sustainedfeverof38
variables.description: Active disease: Sustained fever of more than 380 C for more than 1 week

variables.name: Activedisease_Tonguejawpainandor
variables.description: Active disease: Tongue/jaw pain and/or claudication

variables.name: Activedisease_Transientcerebrali
variables.description: Active disease: Transient cerebral ischemia or stroke

variables.name: Activedisease_Vascularpaintender
variables.description: Active disease: Vascular pain/tenderness producing symptoms such as carotidynia, scalp tenderness, or temporal artery abnormalities (tenderness or nodularity). Such vascular symptoms should be present for more than one day and be non-fleeting.

variables.name: PresenceofACR
variables.description: Presence of adapted American College of Rheumatology ACR criteria for classification of TAK as defined by the 5503 VCRC Longitudinal Protocol for Takayasu's Arteritis

variables.name: _18yearsorolder
variables.description: Is the subject 18 years or older

variables.name: complywithimagingstudies
variables.description: Is the subject willing to comply with the schedule for imaging studies and follow-up procedures

variables.name: consentformsigned
variables.description: Was the consent form signed and dated by the subject or subjects legal representative

variables.name: pregnancytest
variables.description: If the subject is a woman of childbearing potential is she willing to undergo a serum pregnancy test prior to imaging

variables.name: question2checked
variables.description: Are any of the items in question 2 checked

variables.name: subjectenrolledin5503
variables.description: Is the subject enrolled in the VCRC Longitudinal Protocol 5503 VCRC Longitudinal Protocol for Takayasus Arteritis

variables.name: visit_age
variables.description: Computed Age (in days) at visit (where DOB provided)

Subject ID and consent group of participants involved in the "VCRC Imaging Protocol for Magnetic Resonance and Positron Emission Tomography in Large-Vessel Vasculitis (Takayasu's Arteritis): Development as Clinical Trial Outcome Measures Vasculitis Clinical Research Consortium" project.
